pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 53: api call creates survey with this exact title
task.json task description and export_result.sh line 18: target title for new survey copy
task.json task description line 4: 'Post-event feedback survey for the Healthcare Innovation Summit held in Boston, MA'
task.json task description line 5: 'Your input directly shapes our future programming.'
task.json task description line 6: 'Set the survey expiration date to December 31, 2025'
task.json task description line 7: 'Add a new question group titled Clinical Innovation Track'
task.json task description line 8: 'add a List (Radio) question with code ClinicalRelevance'
task.json task description line 8: List (Radio) type; LimeSurvey documentation confirms L is the type code for List (Radio). Reference: https://www.limesurvey.org/manual/Question_type_-_List_(Radio)

privileged_info_summary: The task operationalizes a survey copy-adaptation workflow in LimeSurvey 6 running in Docker. The setup_task.sh creates a synthetic source survey titled 'Annual Tech Conference 2024 Feedback' with multiple groups and questions using the LimeSurvey JSON-RPC API. The agent must copy this survey and rename it to 'Healthcare Innovation Summit 2025 Feedback', updating the description to include 'Boston', the welcome text to include 'future programming', and setting the expiration date to December 31, 2025 (2025-12-31). The agent must add a new question group titled 'Clinical Innovation Track' containing a List (Radio) question with code 'ClinicalRelevance' and specific answer options. Finally, the agent must activate the survey. All metadata values match the task requirements and LimeSurvey API specifications (type L = List Radio).
